description_long: This shotgun features a robust black metal receiver and barrel assembly, paired with a wooden stock and fore-end that display a natural wood grain finish. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a vented rib running along the top, and a prominent front sight. The pump-action fore-end is ribbed for grip and matches the wood of the stock, while the receiver and barrel are finished in matte black. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a visible trigger. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of handling, making it suitable for urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte black metal barrel and receiver, complemented by a ribbed wooden stock and fore-end. The design is sturdy and practical, with a vented rib and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, vented rib, and the alignment of the wooden fore-end beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the wooden stock and fore-end, and the matte black receiver and barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the wooden stock and the narrow profile of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and pump mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented rib and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
